summary.title: Gateway position
summary.body: Funnelplugs is not a generic optimization website. It is a governed interpretation system for identifying where commercial paths fail structurally and what intervention layers are required to restore flow.

sections.title: What FunnelPlugs does
sections.body:
FunnelPlugs helps founders, marketers, and operators diagnose why visitors drop off before they buy, sign up, or continue.

It identifies the missing structural layer in the commercial path: trust, clarity, flow, recovery, or message-action alignment.

CRO asks how to improve conversion. FunnelPlugs asks what structural layer is missing from the path.

sections.title: System architecture
sections.body: Eight layers form the structured interpretation path from the plain problem statement through doctrine, taxonomy, standard, protocol, diagnostic engine, and reference index to governance.

cards.body: The conceptual position behind the missing plug logic.

cards.body: Leak classes, plug classes, and concept papers in one governed index for discovery and internal linking.

core_pages.title: The Manifesto — The Logic of the Missing Plug
core_pages.description: The founding declaration of Funnelplugs. An intervention against structural revenue leakage.

hero.title: The Logic of the Missing Plug
hero.lead: Revenue is often lost not because traffic is absent, but because the commercial path is structurally incomplete.

summary.title: Foundational position
summary.body: Funnelplugs exists to make missing structural intervention layers visible, classifiable, and correctable.

sections.title: 01. The Fallacy of Volume
sections.body: Many systems mistake traffic shortage for the root cause of failure. But the deeper cause is often structural incompleteness inside the commercial path itself.

sections.title: 02. The Doctrine
sections.body: We do not treat commercial leakage as vague underperformance. We treat it as evidence that a required plug is missing from the system.

sections.title: 03. The Position
sections.body: Funnelplugs is not a generic marketing site. It is a sovereign reference layer for reading revenue leakage with structural precision.

related_pages.label: Protocol
related_pages.description: See how the system classifies incompleteness.

related_pages.label: Funnel Integrity Standard
related_pages.description: View the formal conditions of structural soundness.

related_pages.label: The FunnelPlugs Doctrine
related_pages.description: The governing thesis behind the missing plug logic and why commercial paths fail structurally.

core_pages.title: The Protocol — Identification & Intervention
core_pages.description: The methodological system for classifying and correcting structural revenue leakage.

hero.title: Identification and Intervention Protocol
hero.lead: A governed methodology for mapping commercial incompleteness, classifying failure, and assigning the right intervention layer.

summary.title: Protocol role
summary.body: The protocol translates conceptual doctrine into a repeatable system for diagnosing where commercial flow breaks and what kind of plug is required.

cards.title: Detection
cards.body: Map the commercial path against the integrity standard to identify incomplete zones.

cards.title: Classification
cards.body: Assign leakage to a structural class such as friction, trust failure, discontinuity, or recovery absence.

cards.title: Intervention
cards.body: Define the correct plug class required to restore continuity, trust, or completion.

related_pages.label: Funnel Integrity Standard
related_pages.description: Review the formal requirements of a structurally sound path.

core_pages.title: Funnel Integrity Standard — Funnelplugs
core_pages.description: The formal standard that defines what a sound, complete, and conversion-capable digital commercial journey requires.

hero.title: Funnel Integrity Standard
hero.lead: A governed standard for defining whether a commercial path is structurally sound, complete, and capable of carrying revenue without hidden collapse.

summary.title: Standard role
summary.body: The standard defines the minimum structural conditions required for commercial continuity, trust, clarity, response, and recovery.

items.title: Trust Integrity
items.body: The path must sustain confidence at decision-critical points.

items.title: Flow Continuity
items.body: The path must not break, stall, or create avoidable interruption between intent and completion.

items.title: Recovery Readiness
items.body: The system must include mechanisms for restoring momentum after abandonment or hesitation.

related_pages.label: Protocol
related_pages.description: See how the standard is applied diagnostically.

related_pages.label: Registry
related_pages.description: View plug classes aligned with the standard.

core_pages.title: Plug Registry — Funnelplugs
core_pages.description: A governed reference layer for plugs, intervention classes, and structured response categories organized under the Funnelplugs standard.

hero.title: Plug Registry
hero.lead: A governed classification layer for the intervention systems required to restore structural integrity across digital customer journeys.

summary.title: Registry logic
summary.body: The registry does not list software casually. It organizes intervention categories under a governed reference structure aligned with the Funnel Integrity Standard.

cards.title: Trust Infrastructure
cards.body: Intervention layers that restore confidence, proof, and legitimacy.

cards.title: Flow Continuity
cards.body: Systems that reduce interruption and maintain movement through the path.

cards.title: Recovery Systems
cards.body: Mechanisms that restore momentum after drop-off, hesitation, or abandonment.

cards.title: Reference index
cards.body: All governed leak classes, plug classes, and concept papers linked for crawl paths and human navigation.

cards.title: Leak class pages
cards.body: Each structural leak class has a dedicated page aligned with the Revenue Leak Diagnostic Engine taxonomy.

cards.title: Plug class pages
cards.body: Intervention classes describe what must be restored, not product SKUs, keeping recommendations structurally honest.

hero.lead: A practical diagnostic layer for identifying where structural incompleteness suppresses flow, trust, completion, or recovery.

summary.title: Engine role
summary.body: The engine converts the Funnelplugs doctrine into a decision-support layer capable of exposing missing plugs and guiding intervention logic.

items.title: Failure Class
items.body: What type of systemic weakness is present.

items.title: Intervention Priority
items.body: Which plug class should be addressed first.

sections.body: The interactive evaluation layer will be introduced through the controlled utility build sequence. The current page defines the strategic function of the engine within the sovereign architecture.

scaling_factory.scale_rule: Mass-scale page generation is allowed only through validated taxonomy, governed templates, real structural purpose, and passed quality gates.

content_system.page_quality_rule: No page is generated unless it has structural purpose, metadata completeness, canonical clarity, and conceptual fit.
